title.en: At this time, he thought of a place.

content.en:
Ye Tian searched all over the Dimensional Sea, and spent a long time, but he still didn't find the inheritance or treasure left by the Ultimate Supreme Venerable.

At this time, he thought of a place.

"Tianqu Forbidden Zone!"

This place is very mysterious, and there are many mysterious places besides the abyss of eternal night, some of which he has not even set foot in.

After all, the Tianqu Forbidden Area does not allow the Ultimate Realm Master Forbidden Zone, even if it is a first-grade Ultimate Realm Master, he can't enter, otherwise it will cause a great terror.

Therefore, Ye Tian wanted to continue to explore the Tianqu Forbidden Area.

Of course, he would copy the body of a Nine Realms peak and wander around the Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

Although his copy body is only the cultivation of the peak of the Nine Realms, and it can't exert too strong strength, the ultimate dimensional killing moves he has mastered can be used, and the control of the perfect ultimate body is also incomparable to the peak of the other Nine Realms "Zero Eighty-Three", and the combat power exerted should be even stronger than the average Ultimate Realm Lord.

This time.

Ye Tian is ready to explore the entire Tianqu forbidden area, maybe there is something or opportunity he needs here.

......

Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

Ye Tian began to explore deeply, entering one dangerous place after another.

With his strong strength, he ignores all dangers, but sometimes he is trapped in some dangerous places and can only get out for a long time.

Sometimes he was afraid of losing time, so he directly gave up the replica body, recondensed the replica body and continued to explore.

And just like that, the long years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a mysterious place in the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, and as soon as he entered here, he sensed one ultimate creature after another.

The strength of these ultimate creatures is extremely terrifying, and it feels like they are not much weaker than the beasts of the eternal night, and there are quite a few of them.

It can be said that any Nine Realms peak who comes in will definitely die.

Only Ye Tiancai had any hope of fighting these ultimate creatures.

"Eternal Night Abyss Knife!"

Ye Tian fought with these ultimate creatures.

Thundered!!!!

These ultimate creatures continued to besiege Ye Tian, but Ye Tian's combat power was too terrifying, and the degree of control over the ultimate body was too high, and the power exerted was extremely terrifying.

He had almost exerted the strength of the Nine Realms Peak to the true extreme.

"Kill!"

An ultimate creature was slashed by Ye Tian.

Immediately after, one ultimate creature after another was killed by Ye Tian, and his own injuries were not serious.

After killing for a long time, the ultimate creatures that finally killed here all ran away before he continued to move forward.

He wondered what so many ultimate creatures were gathered here for.

After a while, he saw a broken monument with some patterns engraved on it.

The aura emanating from this pattern gave him a lot of insights.

"Those ultimate creatures are here for this!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

He sat cross-legged and began to comprehend the pattern on the broken tablet.

After a while.

Ye Tian showed a look of surprise.

"Sure enough, this should be the inheritance left behind by a certain Ultimate Extreme Venerable, or second only to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable. Ye Tian muttered.

It does not refer only to some kind of ultimate body, but it also involves the mystery of the ultimate body, as if it is the source or foundation of all ultimate bodies.

Of course, it is very mutilated, or it is not mutilated, but it is created and cannot be created, only a little bit can be created.

Contemplating this inheritance was very helpful for Ye Tian to perfect and create other ultimate bodies.

Ye Tian has never been able to create the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body Method, maybe this inheritance can help him create the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body Method.

So in the following days, Ye Tian focused on creating this Yuanxing Ultimate Body Method.

Combined with this broken stele pattern, the black giant pillar, the fragment of the Mi pivot disk, and Ye Tian's own ultimate talent.

Finally this day.

The Yuanxing Ultimate Body Method was successfully created.

......

Sea of Dimensions.

The main body of the abyss is here.

Ye Tian stayed in its internal core area and began to frantically absorb the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star to cultivate his Abyssal Star Ultimate Body.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the Yuan Star continued to vent into Ye Tian's body, causing the entire Yuan Xing aura to quickly decrease.

Seeing this scene, the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable immediately frowned.

"What's going on?"

He was a little confused.

Suddenly, he thought of Ye Tian, except for having something to do with this person, he couldn't think of anything else0.

"The Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable is in the main body of the Yuanxing, it should be made by him, if he didn't make it, he should be able to solve it, if he can't even solve it, it's useless for me to worry!"

After thinking about it, the giant axe Jizun calmed down.

After a long time.

The energy aura of the main body of the Abyssal Star dropped to an extremely low level, as if it had become an ordinary star.

And at this time, Ye Tian no longer absorbed the energy of the main body of the Abyssal Star, because he had already cultivated the ultimate body of the Abyssal Star.

It's not a prototype, but a real entry.

Of course, it also took him a long time.

"Yuanxing Ultimate Body Entry, my body strength is much stronger than in the past, plus the Darkest Ultimate Body, I now have two Ultimate Bodies!"

Ye Tian's current strength should be even stronger than that of the ultimate creature in the Ultimate Dark Domain, and he even had the hope of killing the other party.

But Ye Tian is still not satisfied with this strength, he still wants to become stronger.

"Next, I tried to create the Eternal Night Ultimate Body Method. "

Ye Tian decided.

And he did so, using the pattern of the broken monument to create the Eternal Night Ultimate Body Method, but his foundation seemed to have been exhausted a lot, and this time it became extremely difficult to comprehend and create.

Maybe it's because there is less knowledge, and more inheritance knowledge is needed, otherwise the created Ultimate Body Method 5.2 will not be able to get rid of the Dark Ultimate Body and the Abyss Ultimate Body at all, and there will be no way to create a new Ultimate Body Method.

......

The ultimate dark domain.

Ye Tian was going to find trouble with the ultimate creature that had condensed the ultimate body, maybe the other party's lair would have something good.

In the past, his strength was not good, so he didn't have such thoughts, but now that his strength has improved, he naturally has to take a look.

Soon.

Ye Tian found the ultimate creature.

Roar!!!

An incomparably terrifying Ultimate Creature appeared, and the Ultimate Body on its body was extremely terrifying, and the aura it emitted made it difficult for ordinary first-grade Ultimate Realm Lords to calm down.

But Ye Tian ignored the other party's breath, and the Darkest Ultimate Body and the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body all burst out, and immediately slashed at this ultimate creature with a single sword.
